items.title: Administrative identities require MFA and conditional access in the scoped production environment.
items.rationale: Deterministic machine state over a narrow identity predicate.

items.title: Audit logging is enabled with a declared retention window for the scoped production runtime.
items.rationale: Deterministic machine state over a narrow logging predicate.

items.title: Public ingress is HTTPS-only with managed certificates and TLS 1.2 or higher.
items.rationale: Deterministic edge configuration over a narrow TLS predicate.

items.title: Scoped runtime service accounts do not use user-managed long-lived keys.
items.rationale: Deterministic machine credential state over a narrow key-hygiene predicate.

items.title: The scoped workload runs only in the declared approved regions.
items.rationale: Deterministic deployment-boundary state over a narrow location predicate.

items.title: Backup snapshots are scheduled with a declared immutable retention window.
items.rationale: Deterministic backup configuration over a narrow recovery predicate.

items.title: Security awareness completion is documented for the current review period.
items.rationale: Documentary training evidence is attestation-routed in the current corridor.

items.title: A restore exercise is documented inside the declared review window.
items.rationale: Recovery exercise evidence is attestation-routed in the current corridor.

items.title: The processor register is current and DPA coverage is declared for the reviewed subprocessors.
items.rationale: Third-party and processor evidence is currently documentary rather than machine-proved.

items.title: The DSR runbook is approved and has a named owner for the current review window.
items.rationale: Privacy operations documentation is currently attestation-routed.

items.title: Privacy-by-design adequacy has been demonstrated for the full product change process.
items.rationale: Privacy-by-design adequacy remains explicitly outside the machine-proof corridor.

items.title: A typed export of periodic access review evidence is present for the current review window.
items.rationale: Periodic access review can be machine-checked only when a typed export exists.

note: Synthetic persisted routing artifact for the OpenCompliance prove/attest/judgment split.
